title: Arts. 1221 to 1223 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
SECTION 2--OF THE TAX DUE BY FOREIGN HEIRS,

LEGATEES AND DONEES

Art. 1221.  Arts. 1221 to 1223 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
